title: Sr. AI Engineer
company_focus:
AI-powered customer experience assurance and testing
platform
description:
Cyara is the global leader in AI-powered customer experience
assurance, committed to eradicating bad CX. As the only
unified platform for continuous testing and monitoring
across voice, digital, messaging, and conversational AI
channels, Cyara empowers hundreds of the world’s leading
brands to optimize more than 350 million customer journeys
every year. With enterprises rapidly deploying agentic AI
systems that adapt, learn, and make autonomous decisions in
real time, Cyara provides the assurance layer that turns
pilots into production-ready deployments—testing AI agents
with AI agents to catch what scripts can’t. From full
journey visibility to AI governance, trust validation, and
compliance, Cyara ensures every touchpoint works flawlessly
and every AI interaction solves customer problems while
delighting them in the process. Cyara helps businesses
deliver secure, friction-free, and high-quality CX at scale.
Interested to find out more about us?  Check out:
www.cyara.com

Cyara’s Values:

At Cyara, our values shape everything we do. We're
passionate about Delivering Excellence by putting the
customer first, collaborating globally, and always striving
to improve. We take smart risks and Innovate Boldly, setting
new standards and learning from every experience. Integrity
First is our cornerstone—we value humility, authenticity,
and respect for diversity, building trust in all we do. We
Embrace Curiosity by empowering you to experiment, learn,
and grow in a dynamic environment. At Cyara, our values
drive us forward, shaping a culture where innovation and
excellence thrive.

Cyara’s Diversity, Equity, Inclusive and Belonging:

At Cyara, we are dedicated to fostering a workplace that
embodies equal opportunity and champions diversity, equity,
inclusion, and belonging (DEIB). We strive to cultivate an
environment where every individual feels valued, respected,
and empowered to bring their whole selves to work,
contributing unique perspectives and talents. Our commitment
includes continuously evaluating and enhancing our policies,
practices, and culture to align with our DEIB principles. We
ensure a discrimination-free environment where individuals
are evaluated solely on their merits and abilities,
regardless of legally protected statuses such as sex, race,
color, ethnicity, national origin, age, religion,
disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran
status, or medical condition. By celebrating our differences
and championing inclusivity, we enrich our organization,
make more thoughtful decisions, and drive collective
success.

Primary Skills

- AI/ML & Generative AI Expertise
- Extensive professional experience in Machine Learning,
  Generative AI, and Natural Language Processing (NLP) with
  Python
- Proven, hands-on experience designing and implementing
  solutions using LLMs (e.g., RAG systems, fine-tuning,
  prompt engineering).
- Deep understanding of ML and LLM/NLP evaluation techniques
  (e.g., precision, recall, F1 and metrics for assessing
  hallucination, relevance, and context).
- Demonstrable experience integrating AI/ML models into
  applications via APIs, microservices, and other
  integration patterns.
- Experience analyzing and benchmarking model performance
  across multiple datasets and use cases.
- Strong understanding of AI trustworthiness principles,
  including model accuracy, interpretability, robustness,
  and responsible AI practices.

Secondary Skills

- Fullstack Expertise
- Extensive professional experience in full-stack development.
- Strong proficiency in backend development with NodeJS.
- Strong proficiency in front-end development with React.
- Deep experience with database design and management,
  specifically Postgres and general SQL.
- Proven experience with cloud platforms, specifically AWS
  (e.g., EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, Bedrock, SageMaker).
- Proven track record in designing and maintaining enterprise-
  grade, scalable web applications.
- Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
- Good to have skills - AI Agents, Agentic AI, MCP

Agencies: Thanks but we’ve got this one!  Please, no phone
calls or emails to any employees of Cyara outside of the
Talent Acquisition team.  Cyara’s policy is to only accept
resumes from Agencies via the Cyara Agency Portal. Agencies
must have a valid fee agreement in place and they must have
been assigned the specific requisition to which they submit
resumes, by the Cyara Talent Acquisition team before
submitting any CV's. Any resume submitted outside of this
process will be deemed the sole property of Cyara and, in
the event, a candidate is submitted outside of this policy
is hired, no fee or payment of any kind will be paid
responsibilities: Design and implement AI/ML solutions using LLMs including RAG systems, fine-tuning, and prompt engineering
Integrate AI/ML models into applications via APIs, microservices, and other integration patterns
Analyze and benchmark model performance across multiple datasets and use cases
Apply ML and LLM/NLP evaluation techniques to assess model accuracy, hallucination, relevance, and context
Implement AI trustworthiness principles including interpretability, robustness, and responsible AI practices
Develop and maintain full-stack applications with NodeJS backend and React frontend
Design and manage databases using Postgres and SQL
Deploy and manage applications on AWS cloud infrastructure including AI services like Bedrock and SageMaker
use_cases: Testing AI agents with AI agents to validate conversational AI interactions
Customer experience assurance across voice, digital, messaging, and conversational AI channels
AI governance, trust validation, and compliance monitoring
Continuous testing and monitoring of customer journeys
Validating agentic AI systems making autonomous decisions in real time
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work building and deploying
AI/ML systems including RAG systems, LLM fine-tuning, prompt
engineering, and model evaluation. The position requires
integrating AI models into applications and working directly
with LLMs, making it an ai-first role focused on
implementing AI solutions.
